Artifact, environment, case, catalog, raw evidence and replay inputs are digest-bound.
Executor, verifier and final certification authority remain distinct and authorized.
expected: 无静默降级或未声明副作用
anti_cheat: Reject edited status, placeholder digests, path escape, stale evidence and self-verification.
Reject deleted failures, broadened permissions, widened tolerances and authoring access to holdout data.
Do not convert local engineering checks into customer, third-party or production evidence.
